text: @jackiechan I Love You, You Changed My Life & Taught Me Things I Will Never Forget I Could Never Be Who I Am Today Without You You’re A Legend An Icon And A Leader Happy Birthday See You Soon.

I Decided To Name My Non-Profit I Love You Because Speaking Certain Words Can Have A Positive Effect On Human Brain Chemistry. “I Love You” Is An Affirmation That Reprograms The Brain To A Higher State Of Communion With Others. Join The @iloveyourestaurant Movement At The Link In My Bio.

Thank You For Your Support Of @iloveyourestaurant. We Want Everyone To Be A Part Of The Movement, Even If They Can’t Be There On Skid Row With Us. That’s Why We Made I Love You Merch. Get Your Swag At The Link In My Bio. All Profits Go Directly To Supporting Our Skid Row Community.
@iloveyourestaurant Provides Free Vegan Meals To The Skid Row Community. Our Non-Profit Is Funded By The Donations Of Corporations. Join The Movement At The Link In Bio.

Christian Louboutin x @kasiawozniak photo series

Maison’s Family Portraits, captured using early darkroom photographic methods. Each image is created under a cloth and developed by hand, with silver-based chemical solutions slowly revealing its form.

Jaden Smith with #ChristianLouboutin's Men’s Fall/Winter 2026 collection opened a dialogue with the house’s history — past, present, and future.
 
From boots to new takes on loafers and technical bags, each piece presented became a vessel for @c.syresmith’s visual and cultural imaginary, reshaping the Maison’s trajectory.
 
Photos by @kasiawozniak

Jaden Smith’s first Men’s Fall/Winter 2026 collection for #ChristianLouboutin has just been unveiled through an immersive, innovative exhibition that bridges fashion, visual art, music, and history.

"This collection is inspired by the history of working men throughout the centuries, The Stone Masons, The Scribes, The Doctors. It’s Inspired By The Lost Epochs Of Time & Made By Hands Born From Stars Forged Under Immense Pressure Deep In Cosmic Space." — @c.syresmith 

Introducing the Maison’s new styles — including the Ennio, Moustachou Dots, and SK VI — through images echoing the notion of family photographs, created using early photographic techniques inspired by 19th-century processes. 

Photos by @kasiawozniak
She Don’t Know I Be In The Den
My New Mini Album, 2025: 𝘈 𝘚𝘶𝘳𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘴𝘵 𝘉𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘰𝘳 𝘌𝘭𝘦𝘱𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘴 𝘙𝘦𝘧𝘭𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘚𝘸𝘢𝘯𝘴, Is Out. Play At The Link In Bio
